title: podman farm list doesn't show builder platform support
body:
### Feature request description

When using podman farm list, builders don't show what platforms they support

```
# podman farm list
Name        Connections              Default     ReadWrite
testfarm    [steph.firstyear.id.au]  true        true
```

This should show that the supported platform for this builder is "freebsd/amd64". Similar linux and other architectures should list what platforms they support. 

I have found no command that lets me display what a connection supports platform wise. 

### Suggest potential solution

_No response_

### Have you considered any alternatives?

_No response_

### Additional context

_No response_

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
